boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: 각 이동 종료 시 보드 칸 수만큼 <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> 추가
boonClickbaitDescription: 이번 런에서 상점 리롤마다 <multi>+2 Multi</multi> (현재 <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
